source.name: 2026 State of the CISO Benchmark Report

methodology_notes: Sixth annual IANS + Artico Search CISO Compensation and Budget Research Study. 662 CISOs across industries and org sizes; data collected April–November 2025. Aggregate findings from the PUBLIC press release ONLY; the member-restricted full report is not extracted. Grounds the CISO's organizational position and influence.

distributions.context: 64% of CISOs still report into IT leadership; 36% report to business leaders (CEO, COO, general counsel, or chief risk officer). More senior titles correlate with reporting outside IT.
Executive-level CISO titles in large enterprises rose from 33% (2023) to 47% (2025) — for the first time the largest share vs VP- or director-level.
More than half of CISOs say their scope is no longer manageable, even as their executive influence grows — a 'role divided' paradox.
